subcodes.first_line: Glorified be Thy name, O Lord my God! How can I move my lips to laud Thee, knowing as I do that my utterance and my very existence are as naught
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی کیف احرک شفتائی بذکرک بعد علمی بان ذکری و وجودی مفقود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @pain of love; love as veil, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @impossibility of true worship of God
